case_title: ZHEN GUANG LIM VS. DAFENG MA

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-25-2013 CONTINUED TO NOV-06-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
